paragraphs.text: 春天到了，花园里开满了花。五颜六色的蝴蝶在花丛中飞来飞去。
paragraphs.translation: Spring has arrived, the garden is full of blooming flowers. Colorful butterflies fly among the flowers.

paragraphs.text: 一只蝴蝶停在一朵红花上。它有一对漂亮的翅膀，上面有蓝色的花纹。
paragraphs.translation: A butterfly lands on a red flower. It has a pair of beautiful wings with blue patterns on them.

paragraphs.text: 蝴蝶一开始是毛毛虫，后来变成蛹，最后才变成美丽的蝴蝶。大自然真神奇！
paragraphs.translation: Butterflies start as caterpillars, then become pupae, and finally transform into beautiful butterflies. Nature is truly magical!
